description: DMG Magic Item Tables - AD&D 1st Edition

potions.name: Potion of Animal Control
potions.effect: Control 5d4 HD of animals in 60ft range

potions.name: Potion of Clairaudience
potions.effect: Hear as if at a known locale within 60ft

potions.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
potions.effect: See as if at a known locale within 60ft

potions.name: Potion of Diminution
potions.effect: Shrink to as small as 6 inches

potions.name: Potion of ESP
potions.effect: Detect thoughts as ESP spell in 3in range

potions.name: Potion of Fire Resistance
potions.effect: Immune to normal fire; +3 save vs magical fire, half/no damage

potions.name: Potion of Flying
potions.effect: Fly at movement rate 12 with maneuverability class B

potions.name: Potion of Giant Strength
potions.effect: Gain hill giant strength (19), +3 to hit, +7 damage

potions.name: Potion of Heroism
potions.effect: Gain levels as fighter: 0-level becomes 4th, etc.

potions.name: Potion of Invisibility
potions.effect: Invisibility as the spell until attack or dispelled

potions.name: Potion of Speed
potions.effect: Haste as the spell; double movement and attacks

scrolls.name: Protection from Demons
scrolls.effect: 10ft radius protection from demons, no demon can attack or approach

scrolls.name: Protection from Devils
scrolls.effect: 10ft radius protection from devils, no devil can attack or approach

scrolls.name: Protection from Petrification
scrolls.effect: 5ft radius protection from all petrification attacks

scrolls.name: Protection from Possession
scrolls.effect: Prevents all forms of mental possession and control

scrolls.name: Scroll of 1 Spell (MU, level 1-4)
scrolls.effect: Contains one randomly determined magic-user spell, levels 1-4

scrolls.name: Scroll of 2 Spells (MU, level 1-6)
scrolls.effect: Contains two randomly determined magic-user spells, levels 1-6

scrolls.name: Scroll of 3 Spells (MU, level 2-9)
scrolls.effect: Contains three randomly determined magic-user spells, levels 2-9

scrolls.name: Scroll of 1 Spell (Cleric, level 1-4)
scrolls.effect: Contains one randomly determined cleric spell, levels 1-4

scrolls.name: Scroll of 3 Spells (Cleric, level 2-6)
scrolls.effect: Contains three randomly determined cleric spells, levels 2-6

rings.name: Ring of Contrariness
rings.effect: Cursed: wearer always does opposite of what is desired

rings.name: Ring of Fire Resistance
rings.effect: Immune to normal fire, +4 save vs magical fire, half/no damage

rings.name: Ring of Free Action
rings.effect: Move and attack freely in web, slow, and underwater

rings.name: Ring of Invisibility
rings.effect: Invisibility at will as the spell

rings.name: Ring of Regeneration
rings.effect: Regenerate 1 HP per turn; restore lost members in 1d4 turns

rings.name: Ring of Spell Storing
rings.effect: Store up to 5 spell levels worth of spells, release at will

rings.name: Ring of Spell Turning
rings.effect: Reflects 2d6 x 10% of spells targeted at wearer back at caster

rings.name: Ring of Swimming
rings.effect: Swim at 21in movement rate; never fail swimming checks

rings.name: Ring of Water Walking
rings.effect: Walk on any liquid surface as if solid

wands.name: Wand of Enemy Detection
wands.effect: Detects enemies in 60ft radius, causes wand to glow

wands.name: Wand of Fear
wands.effect: 60ft cone causes fear, flee for 1d4+1 rounds; save negates

wands.name: Wand of Fire
wands.effect: Produce burning hands, fireball (6d6), or wall of fire

wands.name: Wand of Frost
wands.effect: Ice storm, wall of ice, or cone of cold (6d6)

wands.name: Wand of Illumination
wands.effect: Dancing lights, light, or sunburst (blindness 1d6 rounds)

wands.name: Wand of Illusion
wands.effect: Create illusions as spectral force with audio and thermal components

wands.name: Wand of Lightning
wands.effect: Lightning bolt 6d6 damage; save for half

wands.name: Wand of Magic Detection
wands.effect: Detect magic in 30ft radius for 2 rounds per charge

wands.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
wands.effect: Fire magic missiles (2 per charge) at 6th level effect

wands.name: Wand of Metal & Mineral Detection
wands.effect: Detect metal or mineral type in 20ft radius

wands.name: Wand of Negation
wands.effect: Negate the function of a rod, staff, or wand for 1 round

wands.name: Wand of Paralyzation
wands.effect: 60ft cone paralyzes for 6 rounds; save negates

wands.name: Wand of Polymorphing
wands.effect: Polymorph self or other as spell

wands.name: Wand of Secret Door & Trap Detection
wands.effect: Detect secret doors 30ft or traps 50ft for 2 rounds per charge

wands.name: Wand of Wonder
wands.effect: Random effect determined by d% roll each use

rods.name: Rod of Absorption
rods.effect: Absorb spell energy directed at wielder; store up to 50 spell levels

rods.name: Rod of Beguiling
rods.effect: Charm, suggestion, or mass suggestion in 20ft radius

rods.name: Rod of Cancellation
rods.effect: Permanently drains magic from one item touched; single use

rods.name: Rod of Flailing
rods.effect: +3 magical weapon; three heads deal 1d4+1 each; AC improvement

rods.name: Rod of Lordly Might
rods.effect: Transforms into weapons; has flame tongue, paralyzation, and drain life abilities

rods.name: Rod of Passage
rods.effect: Passwall, dimension door, or phase door abilities

rods.name: Rod of Resurrection
rods.effect: Resurrect the dead as the cleric spell; wielder ages 3 years per use

rods.name: Rod of Rulership
rods.effect: Command 200+100 per level HD of creatures in 120ft radius

rods.name: Rod of Security
rods.effect: Transport wielder and 199 others to paradise-like demiplane

rods.name: Rod of Smiting
rods.effect: +3 weapon, 1d8+3 damage; 2d8+6 to golems, chance to destroy

rods.name: Rod of Alertness
rods.effect: +1 weapon; detect evil, good, magic, traps; animate objects 1/day

staves.name: Staff of Curing
staves.effect: Cure blindness, disease, light wounds, serious wounds; 1 charge each

staves.name: Staff of the Magi
staves.effect: Multiple spell abilities; spell absorption; retributive strike

staves.name: Staff of Power
staves.effect: +2 weapon; multiple offensive spells; retributive strike

staves.name: Staff of the Serpent (Adder)
staves.effect: +1 weapon; transform to snake 1/day, bite for 1d4+poison

staves.name: Staff of Slinging
staves.effect: +1 weapon; sling bullets at +3 for 2d4+3 damage

staves.name: Staff of Withering
staves.effect: Ages target 10 years per hit; 1 charge per strike

staves.name: Staff-Mace
staves.effect: +1 or +2 weapon; clerical staff that functions as mace

staves.name: Staff of Swarming Insects
staves.effect: Summon insect swarm as cleric spell; 1 charge per use

weapons.name: Sword +1, Flame Tongue
weapons.special: +2 vs regen, +3 vs cold/avian/undead, +4 vs flammable

weapons.name: Sword +2, Giant Slayer
weapons.special: +3 vs giant-class creatures, inflicts double damage

weapons.name: Sword +2, Dragon Slayer
weapons.special: +4 vs one dragon type, may instantly slay

weapons.name: Sword +3, Frost Brand
weapons.special: +6 vs fire-using/dwelling; fire resistance; extinguish fire 10ft

weapons.name: Sword +4, Defender
weapons.special: Can allocate bonus between attack and AC each round

weapons.name: Sword +5, Holy Avenger
weapons.special: +10 vs chaotic evil; 50% magic resistance 5ft radius (paladin only)

weapons.name: Dagger +1, +2 vs Creatures Smaller than Man-Sized

armor.name: Plate Mail of Etherealness
armor.special: Become ethereal as oil of etherealness; AC 1

armor.name: Plate Mail of Vulnerability
armor.special: Cursed: appears as +2 plate but worsens AC by 2

miscellaneous.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
miscellaneous.effect: Immune to all divination and location spells

miscellaneous.name: Bag of Holding
miscellaneous.effect: Holds 500 lbs / 70 cu ft in 15 lb bag

miscellaneous.name: Boots of Elvenkind
miscellaneous.effect: Near-silent movement; very quiet to extremely quiet

miscellaneous.name: Boots of Speed
miscellaneous.effect: Double movement rate for up to 10 rounds per day; haste effect

miscellaneous.name: Bracers of Defense AC 6
miscellaneous.effect: Sets base AC to 6 when no armor is worn

miscellaneous.name: Bracers of Defense AC 4
miscellaneous.effect: Sets base AC to 4 when no armor is worn

miscellaneous.name: Bracers of Defense AC 2
miscellaneous.effect: Sets base AC to 2 when no armor is worn

miscellaneous.name: Cloak of Displacement
miscellaneous.effect: First attack always misses; -2 to all subsequent attack rolls against wearer

miscellaneous.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
miscellaneous.effect: Near-invisibility; nearly impossible to detect in natural surroundings

miscellaneous.name: Crystal Ball
miscellaneous.effect: Scry any known location as clairaudience/clairvoyance

miscellaneous.name: Decanter of Endless Water
miscellaneous.effect: Produces stream, fountain, or geyser of fresh or salt water at command

miscellaneous.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
miscellaneous.effect: Set Strength to 18/00; +3 to hit, +6 damage

miscellaneous.name: Girdle of Giant Strength
miscellaneous.effect: Gain giant strength (type determined randomly); combat bonuses

miscellaneous.name: Portable Hole
miscellaneous.effect: 6ft diameter 10ft deep extradimensional space; folds to cloth
